ops.title: Mask secrets on sibling read surfaces (grep/outline/symbol/diff/show)
ops.description: ccx secret masking (internal/secrets, wired in render.Finalize OpRead) covers code read only. Security review of the feature confirmed the sibling ops emit raw file content on the same paths: ccx code grep match lines (both tilth and ripgrep producers land in Finalize's OpGrep branch — annotateGrep runs there, a mask step could too), code outline --deep / code symbol --body (OpSymbol branch), and vcs diff/show (separate pipeline in internal/render/diff.go, calls Cap directly, never Finalize — needs its own hook). An agent grepping a config value or diffing a change still ingests the secret the read lane masks. Repro from review: ccx code grep API_KEY /tmp/x/.env prints the raw value. Scope deliberately cut from the initial feature (user-approved read-only scope); pick up per-surface, grep first (highest traffic).

ops.text: ccx code grep of a secret-bearing env file masks the value (grep lane first)
vcs diff/show pipeline has its own mask hook or a recorded decision not to
